LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT ADAM CHREKI'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY PROCEEDINGS. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS IN THIS CASE PENDING ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-12-2025 Continued To Jan-28-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Oct-31-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ADAM CHREKI'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Proceedings

The unopposed motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings in this case pending arbitration is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
